terms.definition: Alignment between stated values, recorded intent, and observed behavior over time
Federation-wide integrity score (0–1); Terminal and pulse writers surface it
Per-system or per-domain integrity index; influences MIC multipliers and gates
Reward accounting for verified civic participation; not cash-like issuance
Intent protocol — declares who, why, and what before important actions

EPICON consequence tiers (low-risk record / meaningful state change / consequential action). Distinct from DVA agent tiers T1/T2/T3. Policy assigns tier; unknown actions default EP-3. ([Tiering spec v0.1](../specs/EPICON_TIERING_SPEC_v0.1.md))
Compact ledger commitment derived from operational EPICON before EP-2 (elective) or EP-3 (mandatory) execution — hashes and attestations only, never raw evidence
Canonical `.dat` bundle of sealed history; replayable archive unit
Vault tranche completion record with sentinel attestations
Signed or logged proof that an event or seal was witnessed

[Seal attestation rule](../protocols/vault-v2-sealed-reserve.md#6-quorum-rules) (Vault v2 §6): ZEUS `pass` required; ≥4 of 5 Seal Sentinels `pass` (ATLAS, ZEUS, EVE, JADE, AUREA); no non-ZEUS `reject` — not the full ten-Sentinel roster

Mobius Extraction Code — compact citation address for a Seal / Reserve Block / Epoch; points at EPICON, never replaces it. Corrections mint the next seal (no `S016A` suffixes). ([MEC spec v0.1](../specs/MEC_SPEC_v0.1.md))
Human-friendly multi-line display of a MEC for operator UI; round-trips to exactly one canonical MEC string
This repo — constitution, cycles, policy, sentinels
Live civic AI terminal — pulse, vault, journal
Public School of Chambers onboarding UI
Civic Protocol Core — identity, ledger, MIC wallet services
Playable world layer inside the Shell
